body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
closes #630 

## Content
- [x] use ClimaAtmos v0.21.0 for gpu-compatible topography
- [x] add amip topography longrun
  - following `config/longrun_configs/amip_target_topo.yml`
  - set `anim:false` (not gpu-compatible)
- [x] amip topography + diagnostic edmf longrun 
  - following `config/longrun_configs/amip_target_topo_diagedmf.yml`
  - set `anim:false` (not gpu-compatible)
- [x] add shortruns for both cases (decrease t_end to 1day)
  - I think we should keep these around with shorter t_end (200secs?) to make sure any future changes don't break these cases
- [x] rename `config/model_configs/gpu_target_amip_albedo_function.yml` -> `config/model_configs/gpu_amip_albedo_function.yml` to reduce confusion with target GPU AMIP runs
- [x] remove scalar indexing in atmos `update_field!` method for co2 (replace `(...)[1]` with `mean(...)`)
title: add target AMIP runs on GPU
